item.title: Cynthia Erivo ignores online criticism as Dracula gets mixed reviews
item.description: The Wicked star appears in a one-woman version of the classic horror story in London's West End.

item.title: Police assessing Stansted Airport private flights over Epstein ties
item.description: Essex Police says it is assessing information in relation to private flights into and out of the airport.

item.title: Child abuse increasing and more complex to police, crime agency says
item.description: Police cannot tackle the issue alone, the NCA says, and technology companies must do more.

item.title: Plan to increase youth minimum wage could be delayed
item.description: Government sources tell BBC News they could slow down plans to make minimum wage equal across age groups.

item.title: 'Cowards' - Vinicius speaks out as Benfica deny racism claims
item.description: The Champions League match between Real Madrid and Benfica was halted for 10 minutes, with both sets of players leaving the pitch.
